given: an existing stock record for a (sku, location) pair
when: the operator files the same (sku, location) again with a different quantity and inventory_code
then: the existing record's quantity and inventory_code are updated in place and exactly one record still exists for that (sku, location), with no second record created

independence.rationale: AC2 covers first-time recording of a new pair; this AC adds the distinct outcome that a repeat file of the same pair resolves to a single updated record rather than a duplicate.
